channel.title: Projects on QUIET QUALIA
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on QUIET QUALIA

item.title: MyShorui
item.description:
Overview

A tool for generating invoice PDFs that comply with Japanese business customs.
Supports the Qualified Invoice System (適格請求書等保存方式).

item.title: Codex Meetup Tokyo #1
item.description:
Overview

Gave a lightning talk at Codex Meetup Tokyo #1, held on March 19, 2026.
The talk was titled “Codex’s Strengths Through Spec-Driven Development,” highlighting three strengths of Codex in spec-driven development (SDD): the GPT model’s diligence, stable Agent Skills invocation, and rigorous review capabilities.

Codex's Strengths Through Spec-Driven Development
https://speakerdeck.com/beagle_dog_inu/shi-yang-qu-dong-kai-fa-dejian-rucodexnoqiang-mi
Codex Meetup Tokyo #1
https://aiau.connpass.com/event/384679/

item.title: MyKaikei
item.description:
Overview

A tool for managing and generating the ledgers and financial statements required for blue-form tax filing as a sole proprietor.
When you describe a transaction, it determines the account, sub-account, and consumption tax category, then appends the entry to the journal.
Journal entries (creating bookkeeping records) can also be delegated to Claude or other coding agents, enabling semi-automated daily bookkeeping.
It also generates financial statements from the journal to support year-end tax return preparation.

item.title: BeagleOn
item.description:
Overview

A project that includes an Agent Skill for auto-generating presentation slides using a coding agent.
It can create several slide variations based on knowledge and themes.
Originally created for #aimeetup “Show Off Your Slide Creation Tools & Skills,” it has since been used in practice for the Codex Meetup Tokyo #1 presentation.

item.title: Vibe Coding Feature from Software Design Feb Issue
item.description:
Overview

Appeared as a panelist at an offline talk session bringing together all five contributors of the lead feature “Complete Guide to Vibe Coding” from Software Design magazine’s February 2026 issue.
The session was conducted in a free-form format where panelists discussed given topics.

Vibe Coding Feature from Software Design Feb Issue
https://wnb.connpass.com/event/383711/

item.title: Koedit
item.description:
Overview

“A voice input app you can speak to edit.”
A desktop application that lets you input text by voice and edit it by voice as well.
Created for #aimeetup “Show Off Your Voice Input Apps.”

Koedit - GitHub
https://github.com/beagleworks/koedit

item.title: cxreset
item.description:
Overview

A statusline-oriented script that shows usage for Codex’s 5h/7day quotas and the time remaining until reset.
Designed to be used as an add-on for ccstatusline.

cxreset - npm
https://www.npmjs.com/package/cxreset
cxreset - GitHub
https://github.com/beagleworks/cxreset

item.title: ccclog
item.description:
Overview

A static web app for browsing Claude Code and Codex change histories in side-by-side Japanese and English tables.
Supports automatic fetching, update dates, monthly update counts, and content search.

Claude Code CHANGELOG Viewer
https://beagleworks.github.io/ccclog
ccclog - GitHub
https://github.com/beagleworks/ccclog

item.title: Preposition Quiz
item.description:
Overview

A learning app where you choose the correct preposition from four options.
If you get it wrong, you get a soft, AI-generated quip in response.
Built in 1.5 hours during the event “AI Meetup / Let’s Build Something Together with Claude Max Plan.”

Preposition Quiz
https://beagleworks.github.io/preposition-quiz/
Preposition Quiz - GitHub
https://github.com/beagleworks/preposition-quiz

item.title: Software Design February 2026
item.description:
Overview

Contributed to Chapter 1, “Getting Started with Vibe Coding,” in Feature 1: Vibe Coding Complete Guide.
It explains the basics of Vibe Coding, how to approach it, and what it can change in practice through concrete examples in accessible language.

Software Design February 2026 Issue
https://gihyo.jp/magazine/SD/archive/2026/202602
Software Design February 2026 Issue | Kindle Store | Amazon
https://amzn.to/3NBD7V7

item.title: ccreset
item.description:
Overview

A statusline-oriented script that shows usage for Claude Code’s 5h/7day quotas and the time remaining until reset.
Designed to be used as an add-on for ccstatusline.
Development has ended as Claude Code has implemented equivalent functionality natively.

ccreset - npm
https://www.npmjs.com/package/ccreset
ccreset - GitHub
https://github.com/beagleworks/ccreset

item.title: How Boris Explained Using Claude Code in X Replies
item.description:
Overview

An article collecting especially useful points from Boris Cherny’s replies on X about how to use Claude Code.
Received more than 50 Likes.

How Boris Explained Using Claude Code in X Replies
https://zenn.dev/beagle/articles/_0019_keypoints_from_responses_of_boris

item.title: AI Tool Usage and Impressions: End-of-2025 Edition
item.description:
Overview

An article summarizing the AI-related subscriptions I was using at the end of 2025 and my impressions of them.
Earned one Zenn badge.

AI Tool Usage and Impressions: End-of-2025 Edition
https://zenn.dev/beagle/articles/_0018_2025_12_my_subscriptions_to_ai_tools

item.title: Setsuna
item.description:
Overview

A site for sharing text across different devices.
Rooms created on the service are automatically deleted after 24 hours.
This is a revival project of an OSS app I had built in the past.

Setsuna - GitHub
https://github.com/beagleworks/Setsuna

item.title: Claude Code Meetup Tokyo #aimeetup
item.description:
Overview

Knowledge-sharing slides prepared for Claude Code Meetup Tokyo (#aimeetup) held on December 22, 2025.
The talk was titled “How to Keep Claude Code Honest in Tests.”
Proposes ideas for using Rules and Skills to prevent Claude Code from writing sloppy tests.

How to Keep Claude Code Honest in Tests
https://speakerdeck.com/beagle_dog_inu/claude-codenitesutodele-wosasenaiji-shu
Claude Code Meetup Tokyo #aimeetup
https://aimeetup.connpass.com/event/378288/

item.title: iCUE Restarter
item.description:
Overview

A Windows system tray app built in C# to solve an issue where Corsair iCUE fails to recognize the keyboard after waking from sleep.

iCUE Restarter
https://github.com/beagleworks/iCUERestarter

item.title: Quiet Qualia
item.description:
Overview

The website of Beagle Works.
Features a blog, portfolio, and more.

Quiet Qualia
https://blog.beagleworks.net/

item.title: Looking Back Again at SDD and Specs
item.description:
Overview

An article revisiting SDD (spec-driven development) and specs.
Reached #1 in Zenn’s Ideas trending ranking.
Received more than 100 Likes.

Looking Back Again at SDD and Specs
https://zenn.dev/beagle/articles/fd60745bc54de1

item.title: Trying Claude Code on the web
item.description:
Overview

An article summarizing the basics of Claude Code on the web.
Reached #6 in Zenn’s Tech trending ranking.
Earned two Zenn badges.

Trying Claude Code on the web
https://zenn.dev/beagle/articles/bc6ef88dd68615

item.title: Trying Out GitHub's Spec Kit
item.description:
Overview

An article about trying GitHub Spec Kit.
Received more than 100 Likes.

Trying Out GitHub's Spec Kit
https://zenn.dev/beagle/articles/7976e6ac40c762

item.title: Trying Qoder, Alibaba's AI IDE
item.description:
Overview

An article summarizing Qoder.
Reached #10 in Zenn’s Tech trending ranking.
Earned one Zenn badge.

Trying Qoder, Alibaba's AI IDE

item.title: Recent Developments Around Kiro After Its Subscription Launch
item.description:
Overview

An article covering Kiro’s updates and its subscription model.
Reached #1 in Zenn’s Ideas trending ranking.

Recent Developments Around Kiro After Its Subscription Launch
https://zenn.dev/beagle/articles/5360946ada5607

item.title: Trying Spec-Driven Development with Free GPT-5 for a Limited Time
item.description:
Overview

An article about trying spec-driven development while GPT-5 was temporarily available for free in several coding tools.
Reached #2 in Zenn’s Ideas trending ranking.

Trying Spec-Driven Development with Free GPT-5 for a Limited Time
https://zenn.dev/beagle/articles/99e0a0f3f0db4b

item.description:

Reached #3 in Zenn’s Ideas trending ranking.

A Quick Look Back at Kiro and Spec-Driven Development
